bull_thesis: WVE is a funded, dated, single-binary regulatory special situation. Wave regained 100% of WVE-006 (a first-in-class GalNAc RNA-editing AIMer for alpha-1 antitrypsin deficiency) from GSK in Feb-2026 and is engaging the FDA on an ACCELERATED-APPROVAL pathway using a serum-biomarker surrogate, with feedback guided to mid-2026 (Catalyst-Watch hard date 2026-07-31). The data package is substantive and reproduced: 64.4% wild-type M-AAT restoration and 71% toxic Z-AAT knockdown at 200 mg biweekly, matched at 400 mg monthly — the only mechanism addressing BOTH the lung (AAT deficiency) and liver (Z-protein toxicity) arms of a 200,000-patient US/EU disease with no approved disease-modifying therapy. A constructive FDA pathway outcome compresses time-to-market and de-risks the lead value driver, supporting a re-rate toward $11. Critically, the floor is hard: $544.6M cash (31-Mar-2026), NO going-concern flag, NO ATM/dilution disclosed, runway INTO 3Q-2028 — the company is funded clean through this event and well beyond, so there is no financing valley to punish the equity before the catalyst. Optionality stacks: WVE-007 (obesity, INLIGHT Ph2a initiating), WVE-N531 (DMD, NDA filing expected), WVE-003 (Huntington's, orphan+IND), WVE-008 (CTA 2026). Live ~$6.25 sits well below the event-resolved target with a defined floor above net cash.
bear_thesis: The catalyst is a SOFT-windowed single-binary regulatory perception event, not a fixed-terms arb. 'Mid-2026' is guidance, not a binding PDUFA — FDA-interaction timing slips routinely, and if 31-Jul passes with no disclosed outcome the status degrades to SOFT_EXTENDED. Pathway feedback is NOT approval: the FDA can demur, insist on full approval only, or require a confirmatory design the market reads as a delay; an accelerated-approval surrogate route for a serum biomarker is genuinely uncertain. WVE is pre-revenue with no moat, deep operating losses, and a pure-option equity — a risk-off XBI tape can drag the price below the modeled floor irrespective of the catalyst. A disappointing print collapses the AATD time-value premium even though it does not threaten solvency. The $11 target is a re-rate on de-risking, not a deal-certain payoff, so the upside is probabilistic, not contractual.
sop_bull: Constructive FDA accelerated-approval pathway granted/encouraged: WVE-006 AATD de-risks toward a multi-billion peak-sales opportunity (200k addressable, no dual lung/liver competitor) — risk-adjusted lead-asset value re-rates the platform to ~$11/share (~$2.1B market cap), built from ~$2.83 net cash + ~$8.20 of de-risked AATD + obesity/DMD/HD pipeline option value. Win value $11.00.
sop_bear: Disappointing/delayed FDA outcome or full-approval-only requirement: AATD time-value premium collapses to a stress floor of ~$3.50 (~$670M market cap) = ~$2.83 net cash ($544.6M, runway to 3Q-2028, no dilution) + ~$0.67 residual pipeline option value across WVE-007/N531/003/008. Floor sits ABOVE net cash — survivable washout, not insolvency. Verified floor $3.50.
sop_breakdown: Probability-weighted base case ~$6.50: ~$2.83/share net cash (no debt, runway to 3Q-2028) + a probability-weighted blend of the $11.00 de-risk win (~50% on a constructive accelerated-approval signal given the strong reproduced M-AAT/Z-AAT biomarker package) and the $3.50 disappointment/delay floor, plus residual option value from WVE-007 obesity, WVE-N531 DMD NDA, WVE-003 HD, WVE-008. Cross-check: live $6.25 ≈ base-case fair value, so the live price is NOT pricing the constructive outcome — the spread to $11 is live.
risk_reward: Live ~$6.25: upside +76% to the $11.00 event-resolved target vs downside -44% to the verified $3.50 floor (which itself sits above ~$2.83 net cash). Raw asymmetry ~1.7:1; Catalyst-Watch binary EV +20.6%. Funded-through-the-event floor is the load-bearing support.
catalyst_summary: FDA feedback on a potential accelerated-approval pathway for WVE-006 in AATD, guided to mid-2026, un-fired as of 22-Jun-2026 (no 8-K/PR disclosing an outcome). Catalyst-Watch outer hard date 2026-07-31. Live, dated, inside the window, funded clean to 3Q-2028 with no dilution — a legitimate PENDING_HARD single-binary regulatory bet. NOTE: 'mid-2026' is a soft window; if 31-Jul passes without disclosure, status degrades toward SOFT_EXTENDED and the seat must be re-evaluated.
dated_milestone: FDA accelerated-approval pathway feedback for WVE-006 (AATD) expected mid-2026; Catalyst-Watch hard date 2026-07-31. Additional 2026 milestones: RestorAATion-2 600 mg cohort data (H2-2026), WVE-007 INLIGHT Ph2a data, WVE-N531 NDA filing, WVE-008 CTA.
forcing_function: Disclosure of the FDA's accelerated-approval pathway position on WVE-006 (8-K / press release) by the 2026-07-31 outer date forces a re-rate: a constructive route encouragement de-risks the lead asset and breaks consensus toward the $11 target; a demurral/full-approval-only/confirmatory-design requirement flushes the AATD premium toward the $3.50 floor.
consensus_delta: The street is anchored to the headline 52-week drawdown (from $21.73 to ~$6.25) and treats WVE as a busted cash-burning platform — yet the sell-side 12-month target sits at ~$21.94 (Strong Buy, 16 analysts), an enormous gap that signals the live price is NOT discounting the funded runway-to-2028 or the reproduced WVE-006 biomarker package. The mispricing: at $6.25 the market ascribes only ~$3.42/share (~$660M) of total pipeline value over ~$2.83 net cash to a clean-funded platform with a first-in-class dual lung/liver AATD mechanism heading into a binary FDA pathway decision in weeks. Consensus is looking at the chart, not the catalyst calendar; the live price already embeds a near-disappointment outcome, so a merely constructive pathway signal is asymmetric.
valley_of_death: Minimal financing valley — this is the key distinction from a typical pre-revenue biotech. $544.6M cash at 31-Mar-2026, NO going-concern flag, NO ATM/dilution disclosed, runway INTO 3Q-2028: the company is funded clean through the catalyst and ~2 years beyond, so there is no maturity wall, raise, or burn-hump that mechanically punishes the stock before the event. The real near-term risk is NON-fundamental: (1) a risk-off XBI/biotech tape can drag the pure-option equity below the $3.50 model floor irrespective of WVE-006; (2) timing slip — if 'mid-2026' extends past 31-Jul with no disclosure, the dated thesis decays and the seat must be re-rated to SOFT_EXTENDED.
positioning_washout: Already substantially washed out: WVE has fallen ~71% from its 52-week high ($21.73) to ~$6.25, near the $5.02 52-week low — the momentum/generalist base has largely capitulated and the float is concentrating in event-driven and biotech-specialist hands. There is no dividend/yield base to force-liquidate (pre-revenue). A constructive FDA print into a washed-out, specialist-held register is the classic pain-trade-up setup; a disappointing print has limited incremental forced selling left to do above the $3.50 floor.
moderator_conclusion: VERDICT A, conviction 4. WVE is a live, dated, FUNDED single-binary regulatory special situation: FDA accelerated-approval pathway feedback for WVE-006 (AATD) guided to mid-2026, un-fired as of 22-Jun-2026, Catalyst-Watch outer date 2026-07-31. The asymmetry is real and positive — live ~$6.25 sits ~76% below the $11 event-resolved target with a VERIFIED ~$3.50 floor that sits ABOVE ~$2.83 net cash, anchored by $544.6M cash and runway to 3Q-2028 with no dilution. The base-case SoP (~$6.50) is essentially at the live price, confirming the constructive outcome is NOT priced. I hold conviction at 4 rather than max-5 for two reasons: (1) 'mid-2026' is a SOFT window, not a binding PDUFA — true PENDING_HARD-5 status requires a fixed binding date, and this one can slip past 31-Jul into SOFT_EXTENDED; (2) pathway feedback is a perception event, not deal-terms arb or an approval, so the $11 is a probabilistic de-risk re-rate. value_conviction = 2: stripped of the catalyst this is a pre-revenue, no-moat, no-earnings option equity trading above net cash — optically un-cheap on fundamentals; the margin of safety is solely the funded $3.50 floor, not a franchise. Held B13 seat, NOT apex-lane eligible (clinical/regulatory binary, not fixed-terms arb). WATCH the 31-Jul outer date: a clean FDA disclosure forces the re-rate; silence past July degrades the status.
interrogator_dossier:
# WVE — Wave Life Sciences | Interrogator Dossier (Event-Driven Special Situation)

**Frame:** This is NOT a quality/compounding judgment. WVE is a pre-revenue clinical-stage RNA-medicines platform that screens cheap-and-bad on every quality/value/moat metric BY DESIGN. The thesis is the SPREAD between the live price (~$6.25, 22-Jun-2026) and the event-resolved value of an FDA accelerated-approval pathway decision for WVE-006 in alpha-1 antitrypsin deficiency (AATD), bounded by a cash-and-pipeline floor.

## 1. THE EVENT — is it real, dated, binding?
- Load-bearing catalyst: FDA feedback on a potential accelerated approval pathway for WVE-006 (RNA-editing GalNAc AIMer for AATD). This is a regulatory-interaction / pathway-feedback catalyst, not a deal close or a PDUFA. It tells the market whether a surrogate-biomarker (serum M-AAT) accelerated-approval route is on the table — compressing time-to-market and de-risking the lead value driver.
- Reality: REAL and management-guided. Wave regained full WVE-006 rights from GSK (2-Feb-2026) and stated it will engage FDA on an accelerated-approval pathway, with regulatory feedback expected 'mid-2026.' Reiterated in Q1-2026 results (period ended 31-Mar-2026) and the May-2026 RestorAATion-2 updates (ATS 18-May, EASL 29-May). Biomarker package: 64.4% wild-type M-AAT production and 71% mutant Z-AAT reduction at 200 mg biweekly, reproduced at 400 mg monthly — restores functional AAT AND lowers toxic Z-protein, addressing both lung and liver. No approved therapy does both.
- Dated: 'Mid-2026' is a soft window, not a hard binding PDUFA. Catalyst-Watch pins a hard date of 2026-07-31 as the outer edge. As of 22-Jun-2026 the feedback has NOT been announced — no 8-K, PR, or news disclosing an FDA outcome. Catalyst is LIVE, inside the window, un-fired.
- Binding? Partially. Binary in perception terms (route granted/encouraged = re-rate; denied / full-approval-only / additional-data = disappointment), but NOT a contractual deal with fixed terms — a single-binary regulatory readout.

## 2. THE DOWNSIDE FLOOR — verified
- Cash: $544.6M as of 31-Mar-2026. No going-concern flag. No ATM/dilution disclosed. Runway INTO 3Q-2028 — funded THROUGH the catalyst and beyond, removing the usual biotech financing-valley cap on the floor.
- Net cash/share: $544.6M / 192.4M shares ~ $2.83/share, no meaningful debt. Market cap $1.20B at $6.25.
- Floor logic: A disappointing pathway outcome does NOT kill the asset — strong biomarker package + full-approval route remain, plus WVE-007 (obesity, INLIGHT Ph2a), WVE-N531 (DMD, NDA), WVE-003 (HD, orphan+IND), WVE-008 (CTA 2026). Downside is sentiment + time-value, not insolvency. Floor ~ $3.50 sits ABOVE net cash (~$2.83) but below live price, implying only ~$130M pipeline option value on a bad print — punitive but survivable. 52-week LOW is $5.02 (above the $3.50 floor), so $3.50 is a conservative stress floor.

## 3. RED / GREEN FLAGS
GREEN: Funded through the catalyst to 3Q-2028 (no financing valley — the key floor support). Full rights re-acquired from GSK (100% economics, removes partner control). Strong reproduced biomarker data is the substantive basis for the ask. Optionality stacking across AATD/obesity/DMD/HD.
RED: Soft 'mid-2026' window, not a hard binding date — FDA-interaction timing slips; could extend past July (SOFT-EXTENSION risk). Single-binary regulatory readout — genuinely uncertain. No revenue/moat/earnings; pure option equity vulnerable to a risk-off XBI tape below the floor. Pathway feedback != approval — constructive outcome de-risks timing, not ultimate approval.

## 4. ASYMMETRY
Live ~$6.25 | Target $11.00 (+76%) | Floor $3.50 (-44%). Upside/downside ~1.7x. Binary EV +20.6% embeds ~coin-flip-favorable odds. Positive but not fixed-terms arb — a funded, dated, single-binary regulatory bet with a floor above net cash.

## 5. VERDICT (for the Moderator)
A PENDING_HARD-ish (soft-windowed but inside the window, un-fired, funded-through) regulatory binary. Floor real, supported by $544.6M cash / runway-to-2028 / no dilution. Catalyst live as of 22-Jun-2026 with a 2026-07-31 outer date. Legitimate B13 catalyst seat — NOT apex-lane eligible (clinical/regulatory binary, not deal-terms arb). Most important watch: if 31-Jul passes without an FDA-outcome disclosure, status degrades toward SOFT_EXTENDED and the seat must be re-evaluated.

CREDIBILITY_SCORE: 3 | TRAJECTORY: STABLE | MOAT: NONE | MOAT_TREND: STABLE | SECULAR_THREAT: none
